homepage.heroSubline: Crafting exceptional outdoor spaces across the Treasure Valley. Hodson Landscaping delivers quality and lasting beauty to every project.
aboutText: Hodson Landscaping began over a decade ago with a simple mission: to transform Boise properties into stunning, functional outdoor living spaces. Founded by a local Boisean with a passion for the outdoors and a keen eye for design, we've grown from a small operation to a trusted name in landscaping.

Our approach is rooted in collaboration and a commitment to quality. We work closely with our clients, understanding their vision and tailoring our services to meet their specific needs and budget. We believe in using the best materials and employing skilled craftsmen to ensure lasting results that exceed expectations.

We're proud to be a part of the Boise community and are committed to giving back. We regularly support local organizations and participate in community beautification projects. We understand the unique challenges and opportunities of landscaping in the Treasure Valley, from water conservation to wildfire risk mitigation.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Boise's climate, soil, and plant life for thriving landscapes.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: On-time project completion and responsive communication throughout the process.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free consultation and discover how Hodson Landscaping can bring your vision to life.

services.name: Landscape Design
services.shortDescription: Creating stunning and functional outdoor spaces tailored to your Boise property.
services.description:
Our landscape design service is where your outdoor dreams take shape. We start by understanding your vision, lifestyle, and budget. Our experienced designers then create a custom plan that maximizes your property's potential, enhances its curb appeal, and provides lasting enjoyment. We consider every element, from plant selection and hardscaping to irrigation and lighting, ensuring a cohesive and sustainable design.

We take into account Boise's unique climate, with its hot summers and cold winters, to select plants that thrive in our environment. We also focus on water conservation, incorporating drought-tolerant landscaping and efficient irrigation systems. Whether you're looking for a tranquil garden retreat, a vibrant entertainment area, or a sustainable xeriscape, we'll create a landscape design that reflects your style and enhances your property's value.

Our designs are presented in detailed plans, including plant lists, material specifications, and construction drawings. We work closely with you throughout the process, making revisions and adjustments as needed to ensure your complete satisfaction. With Hodson Landscaping, you can trust that your landscape design will be both beautiful and functional, adding lasting value to your Boise home.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation – Discuss your vision, budget, and property goals.
Step 2: Site Analysis – Assess your property's existing conditions, including soil, drainage, and sun exposure.
Step 3: Design Development – Create a custom landscape design plan with detailed drawings and specifications.
Step 4: Presentation & Revisions – Present the design plan and make revisions based on your feedback.

faq.question: How much does landscape design cost?
faq.answer: The cost of landscape design varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide you with a detailed estimate.

faq.question: How long does the design process take?
faq.answer: The design process typically takes 2-4 weeks, depending on the scope of the project and the number of revisions required. We work closely with you to ensure the design meets your needs and expectations.

faq.question: Do you offer 3D renderings of the landscape design?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide 3D renderings to help you visualize the final result. This allows you to see exactly how your new landscape will look before construction begins.

services.name: Lawn Care
services.shortDescription: Keeping your Boise lawn healthy, green, and weed-free with expert care.
services.description:
Hodson Landscaping provides comprehensive lawn care services to keep your Boise lawn looking its best. We understand the unique challenges of maintaining a healthy lawn in our climate, from the dry summers to the harsh winters. Our experienced technicians use proven techniques and high-quality products to ensure your lawn thrives.

Our lawn care services include fertilization, weed control, aeration, overseeding, and mowing. We tailor our treatments to the specific needs of your lawn, considering factors such as grass type, soil conditions, and sun exposure. We use slow-release fertilizers to provide consistent nutrients and prevent burning. Our weed control programs target both broadleaf and grassy weeds, keeping your lawn weed-free throughout the season.

We also offer specialized services such as aeration and overseeding to improve soil health and promote thicker, healthier grass. Aeration reduces soil compaction, allowing air, water, and nutrients to reach the roots. Overseeding fills in bare spots and improves the density of your lawn. With Hodson Landscaping, you can trust that your lawn will be the envy of the neighborhood.
process: Step 1: Lawn Assessment – Evaluate your lawn's health, identify problem areas, and determine the best course of action.
Step 2: Fertilization – Apply slow-release fertilizers to provide essential nutrients for healthy growth.
Step 3: Weed Control – Control broadleaf and grassy weeds with targeted herbicide applications.
Step 4: Aeration & Overseeding (as needed) – Improve soil health and promote thicker grass growth.

faq.question: How often should I fertilize my lawn?
faq.answer: We recommend fertilizing your lawn 4-6 times per year, depending on the grass type and soil conditions. Our technicians can create a customized fertilization schedule for your lawn.

faq.question: When is the best time to aerate my lawn?
faq.answer: The best time to aerate your lawn is in the fall or early spring, when the grass is actively growing. Aeration helps to reduce soil compaction and improve air and water circulation.

faq.question: What types of weeds do you control?
faq.answer: We control a wide variety of weeds, including dandelions, clover, crabgrass, and other common lawn weeds. Our weed control programs are designed to target both broadleaf and grassy weeds.

services.name: Sprinkler Systems
services.shortDescription: Efficient and reliable sprinkler systems for healthy lawns and water conservation.
services.description:
Hodson Landscaping specializes in the design, installation, and maintenance of sprinkler systems for Boise homes and businesses. We understand the importance of efficient irrigation for maintaining a healthy landscape, especially in our dry climate. Our experienced technicians will design a custom sprinkler system that meets the specific needs of your property, ensuring optimal coverage and water conservation.

We offer a wide range of sprinkler system services, including system design, installation, repair, and maintenance. We use high-quality components from leading manufacturers to ensure reliability and durability. Our systems are designed to minimize water waste and maximize efficiency, helping you save money on your water bill.

We also offer smart sprinkler systems that automatically adjust watering schedules based on weather conditions. These systems use sensors to measure rainfall, temperature, and humidity, ensuring your lawn and plants receive the right amount of water at the right time. With Hodson Landscaping, you can trust that your sprinkler system will be both efficient and effective, keeping your landscape healthy and beautiful.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment – Evaluate your property's irrigation needs and design a custom sprinkler system.
Step 2: System Installation – Install high-quality sprinkler components with minimal disruption to your landscape.
Step 3: System Programming – Program the sprinkler system to provide optimal watering schedules.
Step 4: System Maintenance – Provide ongoing maintenance and repairs to ensure optimal performance.

faq.question: How much does a sprinkler system cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a sprinkler system varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide you with a detailed estimate.

faq.question: How often should I have my sprinkler system serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend having your sprinkler system serviced at least once a year, preferably in the spring before the start of the irrigation season. This will ensure that your system is working properly and efficiently.

faq.question: Do you offer smart sprinkler systems?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer smart sprinkler systems that automatically adjust watering schedules based on weather conditions. These systems can help you save water and money.

services.name: Hardscaping
services.shortDescription: Creating beautiful and functional outdoor living spaces with patios, walkways, and retaining walls.
services.description:
Hodson Landscaping specializes in hardscaping services to transform your Boise property into a stunning outdoor oasis. We design and build patios, walkways, retaining walls, and other hardscape features that enhance the beauty and functionality of your landscape. Our experienced craftsmen use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results.

Patios provide a perfect space for outdoor entertaining and relaxation. We offer a wide range of patio materials, including pavers, flagstone, and concrete. Walkways create inviting pathways through your landscape, connecting different areas of your property. Retaining walls provide structural support and prevent soil erosion, while also adding visual interest to your landscape.

We work closely with you to create a hardscape design that meets your specific needs and reflects your personal style. Whether you're looking for a cozy patio for intimate gatherings or a grand outdoor living space for entertaining large groups, we can bring your vision to life. With Hodson Landscaping, you can trust that your hardscaping project will be both beautiful and functional, adding lasting value to your Boise home.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – Discuss your vision, budget, and property goals.
Step 2: Site Preparation – Prepare the site for hardscape installation, including excavation and grading.
Step 3: Hardscape Installation – Install patios, walkways, retaining walls, and other hardscape features.
Step 4: Final Touches – Add finishing touches to complete the project and ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: How much does hardscaping cost?
faq.answer: The cost of hardscaping varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide you with a detailed estimate.

faq.question: What types of materials do you use for hardscaping?
faq.answer: We use a wide range of materials, including pavers, flagstone, concrete, and natural stone. We can help you choose the best materials for your project based on your budget and aesthetic preferences.

faq.question: How long does it take to complete a hardscaping project?
faq.answer: The timeline for a hardscaping project varies depending on the scope of the project. We will provide you with a detailed timeline during the design consultation.

services.name: Outdoor Lighting
services.shortDescription: Enhancing the beauty and safety of your Boise property with professional outdoor lighting.
services.description:
Hodson Landscaping provides professional outdoor lighting services to enhance the beauty, safety, and security of your Boise property. We design and install custom lighting systems that highlight your landscape features, illuminate walkways and driveways, and create a warm and inviting atmosphere. Our experienced technicians use high-quality fixtures and energy-efficient LED technology to ensure lasting results.

Outdoor lighting can transform your property at night, creating a dramatic and inviting ambiance. We offer a wide range of lighting options, including path lighting, spotlighting, accent lighting, and security lighting. We can help you choose the right lighting fixtures and placement to achieve your desired effect.

Our outdoor lighting systems are designed to be both beautiful and functional, providing safety and security while also enhancing the aesthetic appeal of your property. We use energy-efficient LED technology to minimize energy consumption and reduce your carbon footprint. With Hodson Landscaping, you can trust that your outdoor lighting system will be both beautiful and sustainable, adding lasting value to your Boise home.
process: Step 1: Lighting Design – Create a custom lighting design plan that meets your specific needs and goals.
Step 2: Fixture Selection – Choose high-quality lighting fixtures that complement your landscape and architecture.
Step 3: System Installation – Install the lighting system with minimal disruption to your landscape.
Step 4: System Programming – Program the lighting system to provide optimal lighting schedules.

faq.question: How much does outdoor lighting cost?
faq.answer: The cost of outdoor lighting varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide you with a detailed estimate.

faq.question: What types of lighting fixtures do you use?
faq.answer: We use a wide range of lighting fixtures, including path lights, spotlights, accent lights, and security lights. We use high-quality fixtures and energy-efficient LED technology.

faq.question: How long does it take to install an outdoor lighting system?
faq.answer: The timeline for installing an outdoor lighting system varies depending on the scope of the project. We will provide you with a detailed timeline during the design consultation.

services.name: Fall Cleanup
services.shortDescription: Preparing your Boise landscape for winter with thorough fall cleanup services.
services.description:
Hodson Landscaping offers comprehensive fall cleanup services to prepare your Boise landscape for the harsh winter months. We understand the importance of removing leaves, debris, and dead plant material to prevent disease and promote healthy growth in the spring. Our experienced technicians will thoroughly clean your landscape, ensuring it's ready to withstand the winter and thrive in the following season.

Our fall cleanup services include leaf removal, debris removal, pruning, and winterization. We remove all leaves and debris from your lawn, garden beds, and hardscape surfaces. We prune dead or damaged branches from trees and shrubs to prevent disease and promote healthy growth. We also winterize your irrigation system to prevent freezing and damage.

Preparing your landscape for winter is essential for maintaining its health and beauty. With Hodson Landscaping, you can trust that your fall cleanup will be thorough and professional, ensuring your landscape is ready for whatever winter throws its way. This is especially important in Boise, with our cold winters and occasional heavy snowfalls.
process: Step 1: Leaf Removal – Remove all leaves from your lawn, garden beds, and hardscape surfaces.
Step 2: Debris Removal – Remove debris such as branches, twigs, and dead plant material.
Step 3: Pruning – Prune dead or damaged branches from trees and shrubs.
Step 4: Winterization – Winterize your irrigation system to prevent freezing and damage.

faq.question: Why is fall cleanup important?
faq.answer: Fall cleanup is important for preventing disease, promoting healthy growth in the spring, and protecting your landscape from winter damage. Removing leaves and debris prevents the buildup of moisture and fungi, which can lead to disease.

faq.question: When is the best time to schedule fall cleanup?
faq.answer: The best time to schedule fall cleanup is after the leaves have fallen, typically in late October or early November. We can schedule your cleanup at your convenience.

faq.question: Do you offer leaf removal services only?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer leaf removal services as part of our fall cleanup package. We can also provide leaf removal as a standalone service.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Hodson Landscaping completely transformed our backyard! We had a vision of a relaxing oasis, and they brought it to life. The design process was collaborative, and the team was incredibly professional. We especially love the new patio and fire pit. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: Our lawn has never looked better! Hodson Landscaping's lawn care program has made a huge difference. The weeds are gone, and the grass is thick and green. They're always on time and communicative. A great local company.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: We had Hodson Landscaping install a new sprinkler system, and it was a seamless experience. They were knowledgeable, efficient, and the system works perfectly. Our water bill has even gone down! Thanks, Hodson Landscaping!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: The retaining wall Hodson Landscaping built for us is not only functional but also beautiful. It completely transformed our sloped backyard into a usable space. The craftsmanship is excellent, and the team was a pleasure to work with.

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: We love the outdoor lighting Hodson Landscaping installed. Our house looks amazing at night, and we feel much safer. The team was professional and helped us choose the perfect fixtures to highlight our landscape.

reviews.name: Mike R.
reviews.text: Hodson Landscaping did a fantastic job with our fall cleanup. They removed all the leaves and debris, and our yard looks great. A huge help preparing for winter! Will definitely use them again next year.
